message:
feat(viz): overhaul UI/UX with FrankenTUI glassmorphism aesthetic

Deep visual polish of the spec evolution visualization:

- Glassmorphism: backdrop-filter blur on sidebar, panels, dock;
  rgba backgrounds with glass-like translucency throughout
- CRT scanline overlay: body::after pseudo-element with RGB
  subpixel simulation and 3px scanline pattern at 40% opacity
- Floating dock: repositioned as fixed element at bottom-center
  with 16px border-radius, blur(16px) backdrop, hover lift
  animation, and cubic-bezier transition
- Enhanced dock controls: prev/next arrows (Unicode triangles),
  title display with text-shadow glow, grouped layout with
  vertical divider, canvas with inset shadow overlay
- Galaxy Brain mode: full CSS variable override (cyan/magenta
  palette), pulsing border animation, body gradient shift,
  toggle button with galaxy-active-btn animation class
- Neon chart theming: dark green axis lines (#004400), dashed
  split lines, glowing tooltip (box-shadow + border-color),
  transparent background with JetBrains Mono text
- Loading screen: animated spinner (border-top trick with
  cubic-bezier), "SYSTEM INITIALIZATION" with tracking and
  text-shadow glow, smooth opacity fadeout transition
- Keyboard shortcuts: Space (play/pause), Arrow keys (navigate),
  h/s/d (switch tabs)
- Commit items: gradient background on selection, hover indent
  with padding-left transition, 2px colored left border

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
